author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 4 (2026-05-09): 2 Tier-3 docs added (VFS pivot).

fs/vfs/00-overview.md (193 lines, 11 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open) — VFS core hub. Establishes shared concepts; spawns 7 sub-tier-3 docs (inode, dcache, super, file-table, mount, path-resolution, fs-context). Operations-table layout byte-identity for all 5 vtables (super_operations, inode_operations, file_operations, address_space_operations, dentry_operations) is the keystone compat invariant.

fs/vfs/inode.md (251 lines, 15 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) — struct inode + inode_operations + ACL + xattr + libfs helpers + bad_inode + anon_inode. Covers stat/statx UAPI byte-identity, POSIX ACL inheritance, xattr namespace dispatch, idmapped-mount uid/gid translation, inode lifecycle state machine. Owns the mandatory L3 'every linked inode on its sb's s_inodes list' invariant from fs/00-overview.md. TLA+ model models/fs/inode_concurrent_link.tla owned here.

Total Tier-3: 25 docs (incl. 3 hubs: kernel/locking, kernel/sched, fs/vfs).
